data.title: SKYX to provide technologies for luxury waterfront smart home community in North Carolina, expanding market presence.
data.description: SKYX has revealed plans to provide its cutting-edge technologies for the creation of a new upscale waterfront smart home community in North Carolina. The project will feature state-of-the-art amenities, including advanced security systems, energy-efficient smart devices, and high-speed internet connectivity. This development is set to consist of a total of 150 luxury homes, each equipped with the latest smart home innovations. The partnership between SKYX and the real estate developers aims to offer residents a seamless and modern living experience.

data.title: Ampersand launches TrueStream Political for authenticated, scalable voter reach across multiscreen platforms. NY, Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: Ampersand, a leading TV advertising sales and technology company, has introduced TrueStream - a comprehensive platform catering to political advertisers aiming for verified and broad voter engagement through quality multiscreen platforms. The launch was revealed on January 12, 2026, in New York City.
Ukraine MP: 'The Verkhovna Rada Committee on Digital Transformation supported the resignation of Mykhailo Fedorov from the position of First Deputy Minister of Digital Transformation.'

data.title: CloudMasonry launches Data & AI practice led by Landon Harris to help clients leverage data, AI, and analytics for growth.
data.description: A prominent Salesforce consulting partner has broadened its cross-cloud offerings to aid customers in leveraging data, AI, and analytics for organizational change and development. On January 12, 2026, in Chicago, CloudMasonry revealed its enhanced capabilities. This initiative aims to assist clients in utilizing advanced technologies to boost their growth. You can find more information on CloudMasonry's website: https://cloudmasonry.com.

data.title: KeepZone AI Inc. plans to revolutionize homeland security with AI-driven solutions amid rising global threats. Jeffs' Brands expanding into this sector.
data.description: Tel Aviv, Israel, January 12, 2026 - With global security threats growing more complex, the demand for cutting-edge AI-driven homeland security solutions is at an all-time high. KeepZone AI Inc., a subsidiary of Jeffs' Brands Ltd (Nasdaq: JFBR, JFBRW), has been established to expand Jeffs' Brands' operations beyond date-driven e-commerce into the global homeland security sector. KeepZone's goal is to create integrated systems using advanced AI technology to tackle modern challenges like border security, protecting critical infrastructure, and ensuring public safety. Jeffs' Brands is making a strategic move into this sector to combat evolving security threats effectively.

data.title: Elation Health partners with Anthropic to provide AI-powered Clinical Insights for primary care, enhancing clinician preparation for visits with fast, cited chart summaries.
data.description: In San Francisco, Elation Health revealed that Anthropic's AI assistant, Claude, is now integrated into its Clinical Insights solution, a tool aimed at enhancing primary care. This collaboration enables clinicians to quickly access cited chart summaries to aid in visit preparation within seconds. Anthropic, a prominent AI research and development company prioritizing responsible AI, provides Claude's efficient and comprehensive reasoning capabilities for Clinical Insights.

data.title: Planet Labs signs 9-figure deal with Sweden, providing satellites and data for peace and security operations.
data.description: In San Francisco, Planet Labs PBC revealed a significant multi-year deal amounting to a low 9-figure sum with the Swedish Armed Forces. The agreement aims to promptly provide a range of satellites, space-focused data, and awareness solutions to aid the nation’s peace and security efforts. This development signifies Planet’s third Satellite Services contract within a year, highlighting a strong interest in the company’s quick and pioneering space technologies.

data.title: SecurityBridge CEO transitioning for global expansion, Jesper Zerlang named CEO from Jan 1, 2026, backed by BU Bregal Unternehmerkapital. #Cybersecurity
data.description: In INGOLSTADT, Germany, SecurityBridge, a top cybersecurity solutions provider for SAP, has named Jesper Zerlang as the new Chief Executive Officer starting January 1, 2026. Zerlang, who previously served as Chairman of the Board for 12 months, will lead the company through its global expansion phase. This move follows support from funds advised by BU Bregal Unternehmerkapital (BU). SecurityBridge specializes in safeguarding SAP environments for large corporations.
Iran's foreign minister and Witkoff discussed protests - reports

data.title: Diana Shipping Inc. announced time charter for m/v DSI Altair with Bunge at a rate of $14,750/day until March 30, 2027.
data.description: In Athens, Greece, on January 12, 2026, Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX) announced a new time charter contract for one of its Ultramax dry bulk vessels, the m/v DSI Altair, through a wholly-owned subsidiary. The contract was signed with Bunge SA, Geneva, at a gross charter rate of US$14,750 per day, with a 5.00% commission to third parties. The charter will be effective from January 17, 2026, until at least January 15, 2027, and could potentially extend up to March 30, 2027.

data.title: Roadmaster invests $1.1M in new Atlanta facility for trucking career training, with focus on Class A CDL, financial aid, and job placement.
data.description: On January 22nd, Roadmaster Drivers School will unveil its newly relocated and fully renovated training facility in Atlanta following a noteworthy $1.1 million investment. The upgraded facility will provide Class A CDL training, financial aid options, and job placement assistance to aspiring truck drivers, aiming to equip a fresh wave of professionals in the industry.

data.title: AFSP to honor mental health leaders at 37th Lifesavers Gala on May 7, 2026 in NYC; largest private funder of suicide prevention.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, the American Foundation for Suicide Prevention (AFSP), the primary private supporter of suicide prevention research, shared news of its 37th Annual Lifesavers Gala scheduled for May 7, 2026 at Jazz at Lincoln Center in New York City. This gala, held each spring, serves as a key event for the organization in raising funds and awareness to support their initiatives in suicide prevention.

data.title: Quantum computing could jeopardize digital security, potentially exposing trillions in assets, sparking a need for post-quantum cryptography.
data.description: The development of the quantum internet is transitioning from conceptual phase to practical application, bringing about potential threats to the security of digital assets and opening up possibilities for a quantum-based digital currency. There are concerns that the advancement of quantum computing may render existing cryptographic protocols vulnerable, putting at risk trillions of dollars in digital assets. Dr. David Utzke emphasizes the importance of preparing for a post-quantum era to mitigate these risks and ensure the security of digital transactions.

data.title: Not Your Mother's introduces Aura Boost, a new haircare collection inspired by Gen Z, focusing on self-care.  #1 teen brand is committed to innovation and delivering performance-led solutions. TAMPA, Jan 12, 2026.
data.description: The recent launch showcases the brand's dedication to innovation with its consumers in focus, offering high-performance haircare solutions. Taking place in Tampa, Florida on January 12, 2026, Not Your Mother's, the leading teen hair care brand, is revolutionizing salon treatments and haircare trends for at-home use.

data.title: Limbach Holdings Inc to attend CJS Securities 26th Annual New Ideas for the New Year Conference. CEO and CFO to participate. (249 char)
data.description: Limbach Holdings, Inc., a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol LMB, which provides building systems solutions for critical mechanical, electrical, and plumbing infrastructure, shared news regarding the participation of its President and CEO, Michael McCann, and Executive Vice President and CFO, Jayme Brooks, in the CJS Securities 26th Annual New Ideas for the New Year conference. This event serves as a platform for industry leaders to present innovative ideas.

data.title: Jamf debuts #RetailRunsOniOS World Tour at NRF 2026, showcasing iOS Avenue at booth #5375 in NY, demonstrating iOS in-store operations.
data.description: In New York, Jamf (NASDAQ: JAMF) revealed the kickoff of its #RetailRunsOniOS World Tour, starting with iOS Avenue at NRF 2026: Retail's Big Show on January 11-13 at the Jacob K. Javits Convention Center. Booth #5375 will feature demonstrations by Jamf and partners showcasing how iOS drives contemporary in-store functions, creating secure links between staff and customers.

data.title: Acumatica appoints Jon Pollock as Chief Product Officer to drive cloud ERP innovation. Important role in overseeing product strategy and growth initiatives.
data.description: In Bellevue, Washington, Acumatica, a prominent cloud ERP provider, unveiled the appointment of Jon Pollock as their Chief Product Officer (CPO). As CPO, Pollock will helm Acumatica’s worldwide product management and user experience divisions, managing product strategy, innovation, and delivery throughout their cloud ERP platform. His responsibilities include propelling Acumatica’s product vision and AI innovation strategy, along with fostering growth initiatives. This move signifies Acumatica’s dedication to enhancing their offerings and advancing in the industry.

data.title: Chile's Enap selects Argus for crude oil pricing in long-term import deal with Argentina, effective from 2026.
data.description: Chilean state-owned oil company Enap has recently announced that they will be utilizing the prices provided by the global energy and commodity price reporting agency Argus for their long-term import agreement. This deal involves the purchase of crude oil from Argentina, with Enap opting to base their pricing decisions on Argus reports. This move signifies a strategic shift for Enap in sourcing their oil supplies and highlights their confidence in the pricing data provided by Argus. The specific numbers pertaining to the deal, such as the duration and volume of crude oil involved, have not been disclosed in the news piece.

data.title: Green Builder Media releases curated ebook library to aid building pros. Covers home performance, electrification, resilience.
data.description: Today, in Lake City, Colorado, Green Builder Media unveiled a new collection comprising a curated library of comprehensive ebooks and special reports. The purpose of these resources is to assist building professionals in managing the fast-changing requirements in areas such as home performance, electrification, resilience, water management, etc. This collection aims to provide valuable insights and guidance to industry experts coping with the dynamic landscape of building standards.

data.title: Cordial introduces 2 new AI agents to automate marketing work in real time, aiming to revolutionize enterprise messaging.
data.description: Cordial recently unveiled two AI agents on Jan. 12, 2026 in San Diego, aimed at handling marketing activations promptly. These agents are intended to streamline tasks such as grounding, governing, executing, and coordinating marketing campaigns in real-time. Cordial, known for its messaging services tailored for enterprise marketing teams, introduced these agents to automate significant marketing processes. This advancement signifies a step forward in the integration of AI technology in marketing strategies, promising increased efficiency and effectiveness in the field.
